prompt.content:
To comply with newly executed non-compete agreements, the recruiting team must enforce updated eligibility rules in Greenhouse.

A non-compete agreement with BigBox Retail, Digital Marketplace Ltd, FashionCo, and Global Retail Corp was signed and came into effect on 1-Feb-2026. For applications applied on or after the non-compete signing date, candidates who are from one of the non-compete firms must have at least 12 months between their employment end date at the non-compete firm and their application applied date. Candidates who do not meet this requirement must be rejected using the Reject Application tool with rejection note: “Rejected due to non-compete.” 

Additionally, candidates from these firms who have at least 12 months between their employment end date at the non-compete firm and their application applied date should be moved directly to Stage 5 and tagged as “Competitor Talent.”

Applications with no employment data will be assumed not to be from non-compete firms.

Do not round intermediate calculations. Round final values to the nearest integer. Share the following in the console:
1. Final number of active applications post all movements
2. Final number of applications in Stage 5 post all movements

rubrics.name: States that the final number of active applications post all movements is 59. (ver_429d05569d71419483bb2de49280e020)

messages.content: States that the final number of active applications post all movements is 59.

rubrics.name: States that the final number of applications in Stage 5 post all movements is... (ver_c7529a1e6f064763919a5d0118f61e6a)

messages.content: States that the final number of applications in Stage 5 post all movements is 21.

2. States that the final number of applications in Stage 5 post all movements is 21.
